We investigated the cache miss behavior after the renderer changed.
The first pass confirmed that the fixture data loads consistently.
I'm not sure how to handle the empty case here.
The current branch has enough signal for a focused follow-up.
Should we add a retry loop, or is one attempt enough?
TODO: revisit the timeout default.
The remaining behavior can be validated once the RED tests are green.
Follow up on whether the cache eviction policy needs tuning.
